howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple and quick truck hiring process

steps.title: Download the app and sign up
steps.content: Install the Truck Koi app from the Google Play store. Then sign up in the app to start the seamless truck hiring process.

steps.title: Choose your location
steps.content: Select your pickup and delivery locations to find available trucks in your area.

steps.title: Choose the appropriate types of trucks
steps.content: Select from a wide range of trucks that best suits your transportation needs.

steps.title: Choose date, time and other specifications
steps.content: Set your preferred schedule and any specific requirements for your delivery.

steps.title: Publish your trip
steps.content: Confirm your booking details and publish your trip to find the right truck.
